overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game (Fort Solis) showing a character in a teal spacesuit receiving a holographic video call, then navigating through dimly lit industrial corridors and maintenance shafts of a space facility. The environment features metal grating floors, warning lights, and high-tech control panels.

events.description: holographic call ends and screen transitions to text message interface

agents.ego_description: seated at desk viewing incoming holographic video call from Wyatt

notable_agents.action: Wyatt speaking on holographic display, delivering mission information

entered.detail: large transparent screen showing incoming video call interface with character Wyatt
dark metal desk with scattered papers and data pads
ergonomic chair with high back that ego is seated in

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a close-up view of a holographic display terminal in a dimly lit personal quarters. The screen shows an incoming video call from a character named Wyatt, who appears to be delivering important information. The interface displays a call timer counting up from zero. The environment is confined and artificially lit, with the focus entirely on the communication screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact office quarters with storage and exit

events.description: character stands up from desk chair and begins walking toward exit
exits office quarters through metal door into industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: stands up from desk and walks through office space toward the exit door

entered.detail: tall industrial shelving unit with books and storage boxes
large white board with papers attached, mounted on wall
cardboard boxes and blue containers stacked near the wall
metal door with mesh window leading to industrial corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back to reveal the player character in a teal spacesuit standing up from the desk. The character walks through a compact office space containing metal shelving, storage crates, and a whiteboard. The lighting remains artificial and dim. The character approaches and exits through a metal door into a corridor, transitioning from the personal quarters to the industrial maintenance areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with vertical access shaft

events.description: character begins ascending vertical ladder in maintenance shaft
passes through industrial airlock door into upper maintenance level

agents.ego_description: climbs vertical ladder and walks across metal catwalks in industrial maintenance tunnels

entered.detail: grated metal walkways with safety railings spanning the maintenance shaft
red metal ladder leading upward through the industrial structure
heavy metal door with circular locking mechanism and warning stripes
red emergency lighting fixtures illuminating the dark corridors

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through narrow industrial corridors with metal grating floors and red warning lights. The environment is dark and utilitarian, featuring safety railings and industrial airlock doors. The character climbs a vertical ladder in a maintenance shaft, then proceeds across elevated catwalks, passing through multiple doorways as they move deeper into the facility's infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: equipment control room with monitoring stations

events.description: character approaches and interacts with industrial control console, pressing buttons

agents.ego_description: approaches control panel and manipulates interface buttons and screens

entered.detail: large industrial control station with illuminated buttons and holographic display
large cylindrical equipment with pipes and status indicators
tall server rack with blinking lights and cable connections

segments.scene_description: The character enters a control room containing industrial monitoring equipment and control consoles. The space features metal railings, large machinery with glowing indicators, and a prominent control station. The character approaches the console and begins interacting with the interface, pressing buttons and viewing the holographic display. The lighting shifts to include green and yellow status indicators on the equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimacy of a personal quarters into the vast, utilitarian depths of an industrial space facility. It begins with a close-up of a holographic terminal displaying an incoming call from Wyatt, before pulling back to reveal a character in a teal spacesuit standing and navigating through a compact office filled with storage crates and shelving. As the character exits through a metal door, the scene shifts into a series of dark, narrow corridors characterized by metal grating floors and pulsing red warning lights. The camera then follows the character as they climb a vertical maintenance shaft and traverse elevated catwalks, moving deeper into the facility's infrastructure. Finally, the environment opens into a control room where the lighting shifts to include green and yellow status indicators as the character interacts with a complex array of monitoring equipment and holographic consoles.
